package.name: navflex_object_nav
package.description: Object-goal navigation for navflex: find a named object (e.g. "the green potted plant by the bookshelf") in a house. Two phases: A (searching) — world model imagines top-K frontier candidates, a VLM critic ranks which most likely heads toward the target; B (approaching) — once the target is visible, a VLM grounds it to a bearing in the live camera, LIDAR gives the range, and existing point-to-point navigation drives to an approach pose (world-model gate verifies safety). This package holds the object grounder, the orchestrator state machine, and the DetectObject service. The VLM world model + director + gate live in navflex_world_model; the frontier planner and exploration BT are untouched.
